description_long: This is an elongated, oval-shaped stone with a smooth, slightly matte surface and a pale, off-white coloration. The stone appears to be well-worn, with subtle discolorations and minor surface blemishes, suggesting exposure to natural elements over time. One side features a small patch of darker staining, while another side displays a set of printed or inscribed alphanumeric markings. The overall form is rounded with no sharp edges, and the surface texture is mostly uniform, lacking any significant veining or artificial carvings. The stone's size and shape suggest it could serve as a natural barrier or obstacle in an urban landscape, such as a park or sidewalk. Its visual simplicity and neutral color allow it to blend easily with both natural and built environments.
description: A smooth, elongated oval stone with a pale, off-white color and minor surface blemishes, featuring printed markings on one side. Its rounded form and subtle weathering suggest it is well-integrated into urban or natural settings.
description_view_0: This view shows the stone's broad, gently curved surface with visible printed markings at the center.
description_view_1: The stone appears as a clean, uninterrupted oval with a smooth, pale surface and no visible markings.
description_view_2: A slightly angled view reveals a small dark stain near one end, with the rest of the surface remaining smooth and pale.
description_view_3: This perspective highlights the rounded end of the stone, showing subtle surface texture and a uniform color.
attribute_placement: set as a standalone feature or obstacle on the ground
attribute_pattern: No distinct pattern; surface is mostly uniform with minor blemishes and a printed marking on one side.
attribute_weathering: Smooth and slightly matte, with minor discoloration and surface marks indicating moderate weathering.
attribute_integration_with_surroundings: Blends seamlessly with both natural and man-made surroundings, unobtrusive and easily integrated into landscaped or paved areas.
